message:
fix(core): add mut to mpsc receiver, expand mux pool and async contract tests

runtime.rs: Add mut qualifier to stream_exit_rx mpsc receiver binding
to satisfy the borrow checker when calling recv().await (requires &mut).

mux_migration_completion: Add pool_timeout_cascade_then_recovery test
that verifies a timed-out nested acquire does not leak or restore a
permit while the primary checkout is held, and that releasing the
primary checkout properly restores capacity.

vendored_async_contract_behavioral: Add error chain inspection utilities
and B16b/B16c/B18b/B18c tests that verify vendored error types
(DirectMuxError, MuxPoolError, PoolError) preserve std::error::Error
source chains. These are gated behind #[cfg(feature = "vendored")]
since they exercise vendored-only types.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
